summary: Added `tickChecklistItem` helper to `bin/lib/github.mjs` that replaces `- [ ] title (#N)` with `- [x] title (#N)` in a parent issue body. Wired it into `bin/lib/run.mjs` so it fires on gate pass alongside the existing `closeIssue` call. Added 6 unit tests in `test/parent-checklist.test.mjs`; all 608 tests pass.
